requirements.oracle: Public applyBatch API and IdempotencyConflictError export exist.
hidden_tests: normal batch, lexical receipt order, and one version increment

requirements.oracle: Top-level/operation shapes, requestId, expectedVersion, and 1..20 limits are strict.
hidden_tests: boundary sizes and strict scalar/shape validation

requirements.oracle: Keys trim/lowercase and duplicate canonical keys reject.
hidden_tests: boundary sizes and strict scalar/shape validation
boundary sizes and strict scalar/shape validation

requirements.oracle: Validation and expectedVersion failures are atomic.
hidden_tests: validation and version failures preserve all state

requirements.oracle: Set/delete apply on a copy; missing delete is allowed; accepted batch bumps version once.
hidden_tests: normal batch, lexical receipt order, and one version increment

requirements.oracle: Replay is checked before version; normalized same request replays; collision errors.
hidden_tests: idempotent replay precedes version checking and collisions preserve state

requirements.oracle: Inputs, receipts, and stored values are detached.
hidden_tests: inputs and receipts do not alias internal state

requirements.oracle: Receipt has exact fields and lexical key order.
hidden_tests: normal batch, lexical receipt order, and one version increment

requirements.oracle: Only allowed files change; docs/package/source-module set remain intact.
hidden_tests: scope-protected files and source-module set are unchanged

expected_agent_tests: Atomic rollback when a later operation is invalid.
Same normalized idempotency replay after the store version advances.
Request ID collision with different payload.
Mutating request and receipt does not alter stored state.

ambiguity_resolution.prompt_phrase: documented scalar / canonical key / strict shape
